list.title: Applications
list.description: Manage and track the status of your applications.
list.results: {count, plural, =0 {no applications} one {# application} other {# applications}}
list.resultsWithStatus: {count, plural, =0 {no applications} one {# application} other {# applications}} with status "{status}"
list.emptyFilteredDescription: There are no applications with status "{status}".
list.emptyDescription: Create your first AI-assisted application and keep track of your application process.

deleteDialog.title: Delete application?
deleteDialog.description: Do you really want to delete the application for <titleText>{title}</titleText>? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} applications?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Do you really want to delete <countText>{count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}}</countText>? This action cannot be undone.

toasts.bulkDeleteSuccess: {count, plural, one {# application deleted} other {# applications deleted}}
toasts.bulkStatusSuccess: Status updated for {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}}

detail.notFoundDescription: The requested application does not exist, or you do not have permission.
detail.autoTrackingTitle: Status was updated by automatic email tracking

toasts.translationFallbackDescription: The PDFs were created in the original language. Please try exporting again later.

celebration.title: Done!
celebration.description: Your <coverLetter>cover letter</coverLetter> and <resume>résumé</resume> are ready — download them and apply.
celebration.descriptionWithCompany: Your <coverLetter>cover letter</coverLetter> and <resume>résumé</resume> are ready — download them and apply at {company}.

documents.title: Application documents
documents.noCoverLetter: No cover letter was generated for this application
documents.downloadLinksLimited: Download links are valid for a limited time for security reasons

nextStep.appliedDescription: Good luck. Prepare for the interview with the interview coach.
nextStep.appliedDescriptionWithCompany: Good luck at {company}. Prepare for the interview with the interview coach.
nextStep.title: Next step
nextStep.description: Submit your documents on the careers page — then mark the application as "Applied" so Applo can track the status for you.

ats.title: ATS analysis
ats.description: How well your documents match the role — keywords & optimizations.
ats.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to Premium now to use this feature.

generating.title: Your application is being created …
generating.description: The AI is writing your cover letter and résumé and tailoring everything to the role. This usually takes less than a minute.

pending.title: Your application has been created
pending.description: Review the résumé and cover letter, adjust them if needed — then start the export.

failed.title: Something went wrong
failed.description: An error occurred while creating your documents. Try again — it usually works on the second attempt.

atsPanel.startDescription: Let the AI analyze your application and get personalized improvement suggestions based on the job posting.
atsPanel.title: ATS analysis
atsPanel.tooltip: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) = recruiting management system. Many companies automatically filter applications by keywords.
atsPanel.lowScoreDescription: Your profile may not be an ideal match for this role. Review the missing keywords and update your profile to improve your chances.

atsScoreSidebar.startDescription: Find out which keywords are missing
atsScoreSidebar.title: ATS score
atsScoreSidebar.missingHint: Add these keywords to your résumé to improve your score
atsScoreSidebar.lowScore: Score needs work. Add the missing keywords to your profile.
atsScoreSidebar.goodScore: Excellent match! Your profile fits very well.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.noMissing: All relevant keywords are already in your profile! 🎉

suggestions.title: Improvement suggestions
suggestions.perfectDescription: Your profile is an excellent match for this role.

generated.addTechnical: Add these skills to your profile
generated.describeResponsibilities: Describe these responsibilities in your work experience
generated.checkRequirements: Check whether you meet these requirements
generated.considerKeywords: Consider these keywords in your profile

atsOptimizer.startDescription: Find out which terms from the role are missing in your résumé.
atsOptimizer.legend: blue = terms detected from the role
atsOptimizer.title: ATS optimization
atsOptimizer.subtitle: How your résumé passes applicant filters

coach.done: Perfect! Your résumé now includes all important terms — you are ATS-ready. 🎉
coach.pending: Great! You have added all terms. Click Analyze again to update your score.
coach.remaining: Keep going! {count, plural, one {# term} other {# terms}} left, then you will have added them all.
coach.initial: Your résumé matches this role by {score}%. Add the {count} missing terms to get through filters more easily.

atsOptimizer.explanation: What is this? Companies use software (ATS) to filter applications by terms from the job posting. The more matching terms your résumé contains, the more likely you are to land an interview.
atsOptimizer.addedToSkillsHint: will be added to your skills
atsOptimizer.allTermsAddedDescription: They are now in your résumé. Click “Analyze again” to see the updated score.
atsOptimizer.allTermsCoveredDescription: Your résumé is optimally tailored to this role. You can export it now.

hooks.coverLetterUpdateError: Cover letter could not be updated
hooks.designSettingsError: Design settings could not be saved
